name: I Don't Do Boyfriends
overview: It's Sam's party and Yanna is on the hunt for a new guy to spend the night with. Target locked Hiro. The next day, she wakes up in Hiro's condo. This awkward getting-to-know stage blooms into something steamier.

name: No Strings Attached
overview: After their first night together, Yanna offers an exclusive deal that Hiro can't resist. As Yanna sets her rules, Hiro finds himself drawn closer to her.

name: Break All The Rules
overview: Yanna meets Giselle, Hiro's hot and sexy ex-girlfriend. Hiro begins to break their rules of becoming exclusive Fubus. However, Yanna wonders why she feels pain knowing that what they have is a no-strings-attached relationship.

name: Catching Feelings
overview: Hiro visits Yanna in her hometown. As she takes him to hidden travel destinations, she can't help but show her true feelings for him.

name: Talo
overview: Hiro and Yanna enjoy their holiday trip to Coron. As their "game" closes its end, Yanna starts to feel that she's losing it.

name: What If?
overview: Time is moving so fast that Hiro and Yanna's deal is about to end, so they try to make the most out of it. Yanna, on the other hand, is hiding something from Hiro that would surely make him not leave.

name: The Pilot And The Stewardess
overview: Almost five years later, Hiro and Yanna's paths meet again - now both professionals in the same airline. Their old dream of flying together has finally materialized but now as "strangers". Will this pave the way for their romance to take off for the second time?

name: HER
overview: Hiro meets Sevi for the first time and Yanna senses that Hiro is getting jealous. Meanwhile, Avi tells Yanna that she wants to become a pilot and that they will fly in one plane someday - sounds familiar, right?

name: A SPECIAL GIFT
overview: Yanna and her friends attend Hiro's special birthday party and he's about to receive a special gift that would change his life forever.

name: Safe Skies
overview: Now that Hiro knows the truth, he makes it up to her little daughter, Avi, but he can't help getting drawn to Yanna. Meanwhile, an air tragedy is about to happen that would change Yanna, Hiro, and Avi's lives forever.
